data.title: Major Banks Collaborate on Joint Stablecoin Initiative
data.description: According to BlockBeats, several leading global banks are collaborating on a joint stablecoin project. The initiative includes Santander, Bank of America, Barclays, BNP Paribas, Citi, Deutsche Bank, Goldman Sachs, MUFG, TD Bank, and UBS. This collaboration aims to explore the potential of stablecoins in the financial sector, reflecting a growing interest among major financial institutions in digital currencies.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Opens with Modest Gains
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. stock market opened with slight increases across the major indices. The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose by 0.28%, the S&P 500 increased by 0.11%, and the Nasdaq Composite gained 0.07%.

data.title: The Macau Monetary Authority plans to complete the research and development of the digital Macau head by the end of the year and support on-demand exchange by individuals
data.description: The Macau Monetary Authority stated that a prototype system for the "Digital Pataca" has been built and the first phase of research and development is expected to be completed by the end of this year. Analysts pointed out that the integration of the Digital Pataca platform with the mainland platform is inevitable, and individuals can decide whether to exchange cash or deposits for digital currency (digital RMB or Macau Pataca) according to their needs. (Macau Citizen Daily)

data.title: A whale liquidated his GIGGLE position 5 hours ago and made a profit of 200 U
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, a whale who had a heavy position in Chinese Meme at a high point liquidated GIGGLE 5 hours ago, making a profit of 200 U. This was the first token sold by the whale among the tokens he had recently built up, and his position was only more than 6,000 US dollars.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Expands Cryptocurrency Investment Options for All Clients
data.description:
According to PANews, Morgan Stanley announced on Friday that it is broadening its cryptocurrency investment options to all clients, allowing investments in any type of account, including retirement accounts. Starting October 15, financial advisors will be able to recommend cryptocurrency funds to any client. Previously, this option was limited to clients with a higher risk tolerance, assets of at least $1.5 million, and those wishing to invest in taxable brokerage accounts.

Insiders revealed that as Morgan Stanley removes qualification requirements for cryptocurrency funds, the company will rely on automated monitoring processes to ensure clients do not overly concentrate their investments in this volatile asset class. The bank's Global Investment Committee recently released a model suggesting an initial cryptocurrency allocation of up to 4%, depending on goals ranging from "wealth preservation" to "opportunistic growth." Currently, financial advisors are limited to recommending Bitcoin funds from BlackRock and Fidelity, but Morgan Stanley is monitoring industry trends and considering adding other cryptocurrencies to these products. Additionally, clients can request investments in any listed cryptocurrency exchange-traded products.

data.title: Binance Alpha: Users with at least 200 points can receive an airdrop of 5 EUL tokens
data.description: According to an official announcement, Euler Finance (EUL) is now available on Binance Alpha. Users with at least 200 Binance Alpha Points will receive an airdrop of 5 EUL tokens on a first-come, first-served basis. If all rewards are not distributed, the point threshold will automatically decrease by 15 points every hour. Please note that claiming the airdrop will consume 15 Binance Alpha Points. Users must confirm their claim on the Alpha event page within 24 hours; otherwise, the claim will be considered forfeited. Note: Only limit orders will be accepted within two hours of the event. The Ethereum network may experience congestion during peak hours. If a transaction fails, please try again later. Instant orders will be available within two hours of the event.

data.title: Fed Governor Waller: We hope to continue cutting interest rates, but we should remain cautious
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Waller said the job market may have turned negative in the past few months, and the labor market is now his biggest concern. Waller said: "Job growth may have been negative in the past few months. The labor market is very weak, and this is the key point for policy and what we need to understand." The September non-farm payroll report, originally scheduled for release last week, was delayed due to the government shutdown. Waller was appointed to the Federal Reserve Board by US President Trump in 2020 and is currently the favorite to succeed Powell as Fed Chairman. Powell's term expires in May next year. Waller said his interview went well and discussed serious economic issues, "without any political factors." Waller also said that he hopes to continue to cut interest rates, but stressed that policymakers should remain cautious. (Jinshi)

data.title: Cosmos Health invests $500,000 in ETH, bringing its total investment to $1.5 million.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Cosmos Health announced it has invested $500,000 in additional ETH, bringing its total ETH investment to $1.5 million. The company said it will continue to increase its ETH holdings as part of its $300 million digital asset financing plan. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 122,000 USDT with a Narrowed 1.19% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 10, 2025, 13:27 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 122,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 122,026.46875 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 1.19% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Ark Invest reduces its holdings in Brera Holdings, a subsidiary of SOL, for the fourth consecutive day
data.description: According to Ark Invest Tracker, Ark Invest has reduced its holdings in SOL treasury company Brera Holdings through its subsidiary ARKK for four consecutive days, including 44,859 shares on October 9, 65,810 shares on October 8, 17,828 shares on October 7, and 54,400 shares on October 6.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation and Keyring Network Launch Privacy-Focused Financing Mechanism
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the Ethereum Foundation's funding coordination team has partnered with Keyring Network to introduce a new financing mechanism aimed at supporting privacy developers. The zkVerified permissioned vault on Keyring's mainnet offers access to a compliant and privacy-protecting DeFi lending market. During the initial two months, all protocol fees from the Keyring zkVerified vault will be donated to the legal defense fund for Roman Storm and Alexey Pertsev, developers of Tornado Cash, who are currently on trial for releasing open-source code.

The Ethereum Foundation emphasized that this model ensures the first users of the vault can directly support the legal protection of developers focused on privacy. Keyring connects the growth of new financial tools with the protection of developers, demonstrating that the community can enhance resilience while driving innovation.

data.title: Cango: Mining output this week was 135.6 BTC, bringing the total Bitcoin holdings to 5985.4
data.description: Cango posted on the X platform that mining produced 135.6 BTC this week, bringing the total Bitcoin holdings to 5,985.4.

data.title: Kalshi raises $300 million at $5 billion valuation
data.description: According to market news: Kalshi raised $300 million at a valuation of $5 billion.

data.title: Solana Company Reaches Custody Agreement with Coinbase, Anchorage Digital, and Others
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Solana Company (formerly Helius Medical Technologies) announced that it has reached custody agreements with Coinbase, BitGo, and Anchorage Digital to support its digital asset treasury strategy and the continued accumulation of Solana's native asset, SOL. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Prestige Wealth, a US-listed company, has completed approximately US$150 million in financing to launch XAUT Treasury.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Prestige Wealth Inc. announced that it has participated in and completed a series of synergistic transactions to launch Nasdaq's first Tether Gold (XAUT) treasury. These transactions included approximately $100 million in private equity investment (PIPE) financing from Antalpha Platform Holding Company and other accredited investors, including Tether and Kiara Capital, as well as a three-year, $50 million senior debt financing. The company intends to use the majority of the net proceeds to purchase Tether Gold (XAUT) as a reserve asset. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin is fluctuating at a high level, and the market trend remains bullish
data.description: Timothy Misir, head of research at BRN, said: "The current Bitcoin market is in a high-volatility, calm, liquid, and quietly bullish phase. Institutional capital flows remain the mainstay of this phase, and ETFs serve as a liquidity bridge between traditional and digital finance. Although there will be short-term fluctuations, the macro liquidity wave, enterprise adoption and structural capital inflows all indicate that the market will continue to develop." (CoinDesk)

data.title: Russia to allow banks to conduct cryptocurrency business, but with strict restrictions
data.description: Vladimir Chistyukhin, First Deputy Governor of the Central Bank of Russia, said that the Central Bank of Russia will allow banks to conduct cryptocurrency business, but will impose strict capital restrictions and reserve requirements. At the same time, it plans to implement "quite strict requirements" to prevent cryptocurrency business from becoming the dominant activity of banking institutions, including limiting banks' cryptocurrency exposure to 1% of their capital. (Cryptopolitan)

data.title: Cango's Bitcoin Mining Output Reaches 135.6 BTC This Week
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S.-listed Bitcoin mining company Cango (CANG) reported a mining output of 135.6 BTC this week. The company's total Bitcoin holdings have now reached 5,985.4 BTC.

data.title: Abu Dhabi Airport to pilot stablecoin and cryptocurrency payments
data.description: Abu Dhabi Airports and Al Hail Holding, an Abu Dhabi investment entity, have signed a memorandum of understanding to explore next-generation payment solutions, including stablecoins and cryptocurrencies/digital assets. Al Hail Holding, which previously invested in digital bank Zand, and Abu Dhabi Airports will also collaborate to develop a regulated digital wallet for inbound passengers arriving at Zayed International Airport, enhancing the UAE's position as a global hub for tourism, fintech, and sustainable transportation. The collaboration will also cover the integration of artificial intelligence systems and the development of sustainable infrastructure. (Cryptopolitan)

data.title: Binance: Users holding at least 200 points can claim the Binance Alpha airdrop at 9 PM tonight
data.description: Binance announced the Binance Alpha airdrop, which will begin at 9:00 PM (UTC+8) today. Users holding at least 200 Binance Alpha Points are eligible to claim the tokens. The airdrop will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully redeemed or the event ends. Further details will be announced later.
